c_signature: static void mpfr_extract (mpz_ptr y, mpfr_srcptr p, unsigned int i)
doc:
PARKED. Static helper for mpfr_exp / mpfr_exp_rational (mpfr/src/exp3.c). Extracts a chunk of mantissa bits into an mpz. ADR 0002 criterion (i): no public-API caller in the TS port (mpfr_exp not selected for porting; no exp*.ts in src/ops/). Standalone port would produce dead code.

Unblock condition: when mpfr_exp is selected for porting via the Brent-Salamin or AGM family, mpfr_extract inlines into the parent.
